notes: Thin adapter file that unifies ordAtInfty (Curves/Infinity.lean) and ord_P (Curves/Valuation.lean) into a single ordAtPoint by pattern-matching on C.toAffine.Point; all proofs are trivial case-splits with no new mathematics. No sorries, no maxHeartbeats overrides, no proof exceeds 11 lines. All 10 theorems are dead-code within this file but are actively consumed by Hasse/L6Witnesses.lean and Hasse/OpenLemmaPrimitives.lean.
